summary: Add a curated cart place command and hard-gate raw createOrderFromCart order placement.
reason: DoorDash order placement can charge bricenice17's card, so live requests must be disabled by default and require explicit bricenice17 approval plus an exact confirmation phrase; --agent/--yes must not bypass this.
validated_outcome: go test ./... passed; cart place --dry-run sends no request; cart place and graphql create-create-order-from-cart both exit 2 without all live-order gates
